tools.name: DeCAF
tools.usage: Distills all-atom cofolding diffusion models into flow maps to generate high-quality structures in a few steps.
tools.strengths: Reduces number of function evaluations (NFEs) significantly (e.g. 5x fewer steps), supports SE(3) rigid alignment, includes DeCAF-SEARCH reward-guided lookahead sampling.
tools.weaknesses: Requires pretrained cofolding teacher models (like Boltz-1 or Pearl) for distillation.
tools.github_description: Distills all-atom cofolding diffusion models into flow maps to generate high-quality structures in a few steps.

tools.name: DynaFold
tools.usage: Generative framework using latent diffusion to predict and sample protein dynamic trajectories and conformational transition pathways.
tools.strengths: Highly efficient alternative to traditional molecular dynamics simulations; models complex structural transitions and ensembles from sequence.
tools.weaknesses: Limited to backbone trajectory predictions; requires pretrained structural autoencoders.
tools.github_description: Generative framework using latent diffusion to predict and sample protein dynamic trajectories and conformational transition pathways.

github_top_forks.name: amelie-iska/DynaFold
github_top_forks.description: Generative molecular dynamics model

tools.name: Promera
tools.usage: Unified generative model that integrates all-atom structure prediction (co-folding), confidence-based binder filtering, and controllable de novo design in a single architecture.
tools.strengths: Surpasses OpenFold3 and Boltz-2 on co-folding accuracy in therapeutically relevant categories; provides highly accurate confidence metrics to distinguish binders from non-binders for miniproteins and nanobodies.
tools.weaknesses: Initial code release is not yet fully public/open-source; limited real-world experimental validation compared to established tools.
tools.github_description: Unified generative model that integrates all-atom structure prediction (co-folding), confidence-based binder filtering, and controllable de novo design in a single architecture.

tools.name: dtSFM
tools.usage: Drug-Target Specificity Foundation Model coupling a sequence-native encoder and generative decoder to predict molecular binding compatibility as a thermodynamic quantity directly from sequence.
tools.strengths: High data efficiency (100,000x over non-physics baseline); screens off-targets at proteome scale; retrieves drug-target pairs with 95% recall-at-10.
tools.weaknesses: Strictly sequence-based predictions that bypass direct 3D structural modeling; requires wet-lab validation.
tools.github_description: Drug-Target Specificity Foundation Model coupling a sequence-native encoder and generative decoder to predict molecular binding compatibility as a thermodynamic quantity directly from sequence.

tools.name: GenLoop
tools.usage: Closed generative drug-design loop using dtSFM that iteratively generates candidates, reranks via encoder, verifies with AlphaFold-3, and refines via LoRA.
tools.strengths: Automates the full pipeline from target sequence to candidate molecule with structural verification; LoRA-refinement improves binding compatibility.
tools.weaknesses: Highly dependent on the accuracy of the underlying dtSFM model and AlphaFold-3 validation; requires significant computational resources.
tools.github_description: Closed generative drug-design loop using dtSFM that iteratively generates candidates, reranks via encoder, verifies with AlphaFold-3, and refines via LoRA.

tools.name: LIVIA
tools.usage: Browser-based interactive assessor and visualizer of predicted PPI interfaces embedding Mol* and exporting ChimeraX/PyMOL scripts.
tools.strengths: Runs locally in browser (no server uploads), embeds interactive Mol*, outputs visualization scripts for ChimeraX/PyMOL.
tools.weaknesses: Optimized for pairwise structures, memory constraints on large assemblies inside the browser.
tools.github_description: LIVIA: Local Interaction Visualization and Analysis for predicted protein-protein interactions.

social_posts.text: Alphafoldology is moving fast! Just reviewed RoseTTAFold-All-Atom. Predicting small molecules, RNA/DNA, and modified proteins all in one open framework. A massive leap for structural biology.
Need to search millions of AlphaFold structures? Foldseek does structural alignment in milliseconds. Essential tool for the downstream #alphafoldology research pipeline.
ColabFold has reached a huge milestone in accelerating structural biology. By pairing MMseqs2 fast search with AF2, we've enabled researchers worldwide to predict structures in minutes.
Check out the upcoming 'Advanced in silico Drug Design' workshop in Olomouc! Karel Berka will lead lectures on #alphafoldology and practical downstream analysis for structural biology.
